title: SQL: column references in JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (i INT, id INT, value VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE test2 (j INT, id INT, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test1 (i, id, value) VALUES (1, 10, 'A'), (2, 20, 'B'), (NULL, 30, 'C');
INSERT INTO test2 (j, id, description) VALUES (1, 10, 'Desc1'), (2, NULL, 'Desc2'), (3, 20, 'Desc3');
SELECT * FROM test1 a JOIN test2 b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.value IS NOT NULL;
